description_long: This is an adjustable wrench with a robust steel head and a black handle featuring blue accents. The wrench head has a movable lower jaw, controlled by a knurled adjustment screw, allowing it to grip fasteners of various sizes. The handle is ergonomically shaped and appears to have a rubberized, textured grip for comfort and slip resistance. The brand name 'Cocraft' is prominently printed in white on the handle. The jaws are smooth and flat, suitable for turning nuts and bolts without damaging their surfaces. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both professional and home use in urban environments such as garages or workshops.
description: A steel adjustable wrench with a black and blue rubberized handle and a visible adjustment screw. The handle features the 'Cocraft' brand name in white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the wrench, the adjustment screw, and the 'Cocraft' branding on the handle.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the thinness of the wrench head and the ergonomic contour of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wrench head and the handle, with the adjustment mechanism partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again showing the slim profile and the handle's grip pattern.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Cocraft' is printed in white on the handle, vertically aligned.
attribute_handle_grip_pattern: The handle has a black rubberized surface with blue accents and subtle grooves for improved grip.
attribute_jaw_type: Adjustable, smooth jaws with a movable lower jaw controlled by a knurled adjustment screw.
